purpose: Imagegen prompts for high-fidelity WordPress homepage mockups for every Aesthetic Atlas entry.

items.name: Acid Graphics
items.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity WordPress theme homepage mockup
Primary request: Create a polished full-page visual mockup of a WordPress homepage using the Acid Graphics aesthetic.
Scene/backdrop: A browser-like website screenshot, not a mood board. The page should look like a real WordPress theme homepage someone could build: header navigation, hero, feature sections, post/card grid, call-to-action band, and footer.
Style/medium: high-fidelity web design mockup, crisp UI, editorial homepage composition, raster image.
Composition/framing: portrait-oriented full-page website screenshot, 1440px wide feel, showing the top hero and several sections below. Use realistic spacing, responsive layout logic, and visible section hierarchy.
Visual direction: An experimental graphic movements aesthetic built around strong composition, recognizable visual rules, poster logic. Visual DNA: strong composition, recognizable visual rules, poster logic, intentional type treatment, art-historical signal, date-first hierarchy, large display type.
WordPress theme elements: top nav with site title, menu links, primary button; large hero title area; feature/query cards; latest posts section; reusable block-pattern style sections; newsletter/CTA band; footer. Best for: campaign identity, poster system, editorial package.
Typography/layout notes: Condensed display type plus rough sans; balanced editorial sections with a strong visual opener.
Color palette: Botanical Calm; #F3EFE5, #25362E, #7D9572, #C8765B, #B9C6B2.
Materials/textures/motion cues: raw scan artifacts; kinetic hero type and scroll emphasis.
Text constraints: Use short readable labels related to the style, including "Acid Graphics", "Theme Preview", "Patterns", "Latest Posts", "Subscribe", and one clear call to action. Avoid long paragraphs.
Avoid: wireframe boxes, generic dashboard UI unless the aesthetic is dashboard/product-specific, abstract-only mood board, illegible tiny text, dark unreadable overlays, stock-photo hero, low-fidelity placeholders, watermark, browser chrome from a real product.

Asset type: high-fidelity WordPress theme homepage mockup
Primary request: Create a polished full-page visual mockup of a WordPress homepage using the Mallsoft aesthetic.
Scene/backdrop: A browser-like website screenshot, not a mood board. The page should look like a real WordPress theme homepage someone could build: header navigation, hero, feature sections, post/card grid, call-to-action band, and footer.
Style/medium: high-fidelity web design mockup, crisp UI, editorial homepage composition, raster image.
Composition/framing: portrait-oriented full-page website screenshot, 1440px wide feel, showing the top hero and several sections below. Use realistic spacing, responsive layout logic, and visible section hierarchy.
Visual direction: A quiet internet culture aesthetic built around nostalgic cues, subculture references, screen-native texture. Visual DNA: nostalgic cues, subculture references, screen-native texture, meme-adjacent symbolism, high personality, old web cues, glossy nostalgia.
WordPress theme elements: top nav with site title, menu links, primary button; large hero title area; feature/query cards; latest posts section; reusable block-pattern style sections; newsletter/CTA band; footer. Best for: community site, creator brand, experimental archive.
Typography/layout notes: Rounded sans plus compact labels; conversion-first sections with practical detail near the top.
Color palette: Vapor Mall; #F2D7FF, #1C1530, #FF71CE, #01CDFE, #05FFA1.
Materials/textures/motion cues: soft tactile shadows; looping ambience kept away from body copy.
Text constraints: Use short readable labels related to the style, including "Mallsoft", "Theme Preview", "Patterns", "Latest Posts", "Subscribe", and one clear call to action. Avoid long paragraphs.
Avoid: wireframe boxes, generic dashboard UI unless the aesthetic is dashboard/product-specific, abstract-only mood board, illegible tiny text, dark unreadable overlays, stock-photo hero, low-fidelity placeholders, watermark, browser chrome from a real product.

Asset type: high-fidelity WordPress theme homepage mockup
Primary request: Create a polished full-page visual mockup of a WordPress homepage using the Racing Stripe Modern aesthetic.
Scene/backdrop: A browser-like website screenshot, not a mood board. The page should look like a real WordPress theme homepage someone could build: header navigation, hero, feature sections, post/card grid, call-to-action band, and footer.
Style/medium: high-fidelity web design mockup, crisp UI, editorial homepage composition, raster image.
Composition/framing: portrait-oriented full-page website screenshot, 1440px wide feel, showing the top hero and several sections below. Use realistic spacing, responsive layout logic, and visible section hierarchy.
Visual direction: A bold entertainment events aesthetic built around date and ticket clarity, lineup hierarchy, poster energy. Visual DNA: date and ticket clarity, lineup hierarchy, poster energy, social proof, venue or schedule cues, stats treatment, team color blocking.
WordPress theme elements: top nav with site title, menu links, primary button; large hero title area; feature/query cards; latest posts section; reusable block-pattern style sections; newsletter/CTA band; footer. Best for: festival, venue, ticketed event.
Typography/layout notes: Geometric sans plus mono details; poster-like hero, schedule blocks, and repeated action bands.
Color palette: Poolside; #F9F2E8, #173642, #4D9FB5, #F08A5D, #F4D35E.
Materials/textures/motion cues: crisp flat color; subtle transitions and reveal timing.
Text constraints: Use short readable labels related to the style, including "Racing Stripe Modern", "Theme Preview", "Patterns", "Latest Posts", "Subscribe", and one clear call to action. Avoid long paragraphs.
Avoid: wireframe boxes, generic dashboard UI unless the aesthetic is dashboard/product-specific, abstract-only mood board, illegible tiny text, dark unreadable overlays, stock-photo hero, low-fidelity placeholders, watermark, browser chrome from a real product.
